title: Node Lifecycle — Hello & Authentication
constructor_dependencies: store (mailbox/store — getState, setState, countPending, writeInboundBatch, writeInbound)
hello_flow: RESOLVE nodeId: store.getState('node_id') OR generate 'node_' + 6 random bytes hex
CALL _getEnvFingerprint() → captureEnvFingerprint() or fallback {platform, arch, node_version}
BUILD body: { protocol, protocol_version:'1.0.0', message_type:'hello', message_id, sender_id:nodeId, timestamp, payload, env_fingerprint }
CALL _buildHeaders() → Content-Type + optional Authorization Bearer + x-correlation-id (UUID)
CHECK data.payload.status === 'rejected' → log error, return { ok:false, error:reason }
CHECK secret in data.payload.node_secret OR data.node_secret, validate /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i
CATCH err → log error, return { ok:false, error:err.message }
reAuthenticate_flow: LOG warn: 're-auth attempt N/2: rotating secret via hello...'
IF hello failed → log error, continue next attempt
IF no new secret → log error, continue next attempt
IF heartbeat ok → log success, return true
ELSE → log warn, continue next attempt
buildHeaders_logic: Read nodeSecret: store.getState('node_secret') OR env A2A_NODE_SECRET
heartbeat_interaction_with_reauth: IF res.status 403 or 401 AND !_skipReauth → call reAuthenticate()
IF reAuthenticate() returns true → reset consecutiveFailures, return { ok:true, recovered:true }
IF data.status === 'unknown_node' → call hello() to re-register
state_fields: _consecutiveFailures: incremented on heartbeat failure, reset on success
activity_decision_points: rotateSecret flag? → include in hello payload
valid 64-char hex secret returned? → store new secret
hello ok in reAuth loop? → verify with heartbeat
new secret returned from hub? → proceed to heartbeat check
heartbeat ok after rotate? → auth restored
key_relationships: LifecycleManager depends_on store (read/write node_id, node_secret, last_heartbeat_at, pending counts)
heartbeat() calls hello() when unknown_node status received
important_notes: MAX_REAUTH_ATTEMPTS=2; _skipReauth prevents infinite recursion between heartbeat↔reAuthenticate. Secret validated with /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i before storing. Heartbeat uses exponential backoff: min(interval * 2^consecutiveFailures, 30min). AuthError class exported but used externally (not thrown internally in this file).
